summary: Comprehensive testing of VivaLusa e-commerce website completed successfully. All 14 backend APIs passed and all new frontend features are working correctly including Shop page with search/filtering/sorting, Order history page, updated navbar with user dropdown, mobile responsiveness, cart functionality, and admin panel access.
passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints (products, auth, shipping, admin, checkout)
Shop page loads with search input, category filters, sort dropdown, product grid
Search functionality filters products by name
Sort dropdown (price low to high, price high to low, name A-Z) works
Navbar contains Shop link, Search icon, user dropdown with 'My Orders'
Order history page accessible when logged in
Cart drawer shows items correctly with proper pricing
Add to cart from product cards works (desktop and mobile)
Product detail page loads and add to cart works
Checkout page with shipping calculation works
Admin login and admin panel CRUD operations work
Homepage hero and product sections display correctly
Mobile responsiveness (mobile menu, mobile add-to-cart buttons)
Member discount calculation (5% for logged-in users)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor console 401 errors)
